# virtualbox_vm_storage (Resource)

Manages a VirtualBox storage controller with a single child storage attachment. The target VM is powered off automatically before storage changes are applied.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    virtualbox = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/namnd/virtualbox"
    }
  }
}

provider "virtualbox" {}

resource "virtualbox_vm" "example" {
  name    = "example-vm"
  os_type = "Linux_64"
  cpus    = 2
  memory  = 2048
}

resource "virtualbox_disk" "example" {
  file_path = "/data/example.vdi"
  size      = 20480
  format    = "VDI"
}

resource "virtualbox_vm_storage" "iso" {
  vm_id = virtualbox_vm.example.id

  name          = "IDE Controller"
  type          = "ide"
  controller    = "PIIX4"
  host_io_cache = true

  storage_attachment {
    port   = 1
    device = 0
    type   = "dvddrive"
    medium = "/path/to/installer.iso"
  }
}

resource "virtualbox_vm_storage" "hdd" {
  vm_id = virtualbox_vm.example.id

  name       = "SATA Controller"
  type       = "sata"
  controller = "IntelAHCI"
  port_count = 1
  bootable   = true

  storage_attachment {
    port   = 0
    device = 0
    type   = "hdd"
    medium = virtualbox_disk.example.file_path
  }

  depends_on = [
    virtualbox_disk.example,
    virtualbox_vm_storage.iso,
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the storage controller.
- `type` (String) Storage bus type. Must be one of: `ide`, `sata`.
- `vm_id` (String) UUID or name of the virtual machine.

### Optional

- `bootable` (Boolean) Mark the storage controller as bootable.
- `controller` (String) Storage controller chipset (for example, `PIIX4`, `IntelAhci`). Defaults based on `type`.
- `host_io_cache` (Boolean) Enable host I/O cache for the storage controller.
- `port_count` (Number) Number of ports on the storage controller. `0` uses the VirtualBox default.
- `storage_attachment` (Block, Optional) Storage medium attached to this controller. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--storage_attachment))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier: `{vm_id}/{name}/{port}/{device}`.
- `last_updated` (String)

<a id="nestedblock--storage_attachment"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storage_attachment`

Required:

- `device` (Number) Controller device for the storage attachment.
- `medium` (String) Path, UUID, or special medium value to attach.
- `port` (Number) Controller port for the storage attachment.
- `type` (String) Attachment type. Must be one of: `dvddrive`, `hdd`, `fdd`.
